title: Kitsune Origin
description: Adds the Kitsune origin to minecraft
body:
Adds a kitsune origin so you can play with your friends. This is based off the Kitsune Spirit allowing you to have some magical abilities to use

some of these abilities include but aren't limited to:

 

phasing,

immune to sweet berry bushes,

a munch sound effect to annoy your friends with,

increase food from sweet and glow berries (1.18 for glow berries),

a leap ability,

and more
